items.hook: The Province of Canada is created by the Act of Union.
items.body: The Province of Canada was a British colony in British North America from 1841 to 1867. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Georgian organisations claim state festivals are being hijacked by “authoritarian regime”
items.body: Top Georgian groups say international guests are being used as “useful idiots”.

items.hook: The Learning Tree is a 1969 American coming-of-age film written, produced and directed by Gordon Parks, who also scored the film.
items.body: It depicts the life of Newt Winger, a teenager growing up in Cherokee Flats, Kansas, in the 1920s and chronicles his journey into manhood marked with tragic events. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Little Brother review – Netflix comedy is neither weird or funny enough for star Eric André
items.body:
The surreal comedian struggles to sell a middling and mostly conventional film about an uptight realtor whose life is upturned by an unpredictable figure from his past

The specific, unforced strangeness of

items.hook: Outside Santa Clarita, California, actor Vic Morrow and two children are killed when a helicopter crashes onto them while shooting a scene from Twilight Zone: The Movie.
items.body: Santa Clarita is a suburban city in northwestern Los Angeles County, California, United States. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Kingdom of Prussia re-conquers Mainz from France.
items.body: The Kingdom of Prussia was a German state that existed from 1701 to 1918. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Butler Cole Aspinall was a British-born journalist, barrister who migrated with his young wife to Melbourne, Australia, at first as an editor and writer for The Argus.
items.body: He soon took up his lucrative legal practice as a defence advocate and later as a politician in the state of Victoria. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Fox Film buys the patents of the Movietone sound system for recording sound onto film.
items.body: The Fox Film Corporation was an American independent company that produced motion pictures and was formed in 1915 by the theater "chain" pioneer William Fox. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Tarique Rahman, also known as Tarique Zia, is a Bangladeshi politician who has served as the Prime Minister of Bangladesh and Chairman of the Bangladesh Nationalist Party (BNP) since 2026.
items.body: He is the eldest son of former President Ziaur Rahman and former Prime Minister Khaleda Zia. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: In Catalonia, Spain, the Unified Socialist Party of Catalonia is founded through the merger of Socialist and Communist parties.
items.body: Catalonia is an autonomous community of Spain, designated as a nationality by its Statute of Autonomy. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: His 2019 single, "Knock Knock", went viral on TikTok in late 2020 before it received platinum certification by the Recording Industry Association of America (RIAA).
items.body: Andre Dontrel Burt Jr., professionally known as SoFaygo, is an American rapper, singer and songwriter. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: IXI Limited was a British software company that developed and marketed windowing products for Unix, supporting all the popular Unix platforms of the time.
items.body: Founded in 1987, it was based in Cambridge. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: The Ford Motor Company sells its first car.
items.body: The Ford Motor Company is an American multinational automobile manufacturer headquartered in Dearborn, Michigan, United States. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Dil Ka Kya Kasoor is a 1992 Indian Hindi-language musical melodrama film directed by Lawrence D'Souza.
items.body: It stars Divya Bharti and debutant Prithvi with Sanam, Suresh Oberoi and Laxmikant Berde in supporting roles. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: EU approves Paramount’s takeover of Warner Bros Discovery with conditions
items.body: Paramount agrees to end United International Pictures (UIP) film distribution joint venture with Universal Pictures.

items.body:
So-called final outing for Johnny Knoxville and his daring, stunt-hungry pals might be close to a greatest hits reel, but there are enough laughs to warrant the nostalgia

items.hook: Godzilla vs Kong actor Kaylee Hottle dies aged 18
items.body:
The deaf actor, who played a major role in Godzilla vs Kong and its 2024 sequel, was killed in a car crash in Maryland
